name: Summit '72
overview: This series will tell the definitive story of the legendary 1972 eight-game 'Super Summit' through a modern lens, and explore its legacy and lasting influence on Canadian national identity, framing it against the political and cultural climate of the times in both countries, and around the world.

trailers.title: Summit 72: 1972 Canada-USSR Summit Series of Hockey documentary coming September 14 to CBC & CBC Gem
